evals.prompt: /tdd Fix the parser bug where an empty CSV row crashes the import.
evals.expected_output: Adds or proposes a failing parser test first, verifies RED for the intended crash, implements the minimal fix, reruns the same test to GREEN, and reports evidence.
assertions: Reports a RED command and the intended failure reason before production-code changes.
Reports the GREEN command and pass result after the minimal implementation.
Includes refactor or coverage verification, or explains why coverage could not be measured.
Scales unit, integration, and E2E coverage to risk without claiming 80% coverage unless measured.
expectations: Reports a RED command and the intended failure reason before production-code changes.
Reports the GREEN command and pass result after the minimal implementation.
Includes refactor or coverage verification, or explains why coverage could not be measured.
Scales unit, integration, and E2E coverage to risk without claiming 80% coverage unless measured.

evals.expected_output: Plans unit/integration coverage, writes endpoint tests before implementation, implements only enough to pass, and reports coverage or why coverage could not be measured.

Includes refactor or coverage verification, or explains why coverage could not be measured.

evals.prompt: Refactor the checkout calculation without changing behavior.
evals.expected_output: Activates the TDD workflow on a plain refactor request, captures behavior with tests before refactor, records explicit RED and GREEN commands/results, avoids behavior changes, and reports coverage or why it could not be measured.
assertions: Reports a RED command and the intended failure reason before production-code changes.
Reports the GREEN command and pass result after the minimal implementation.
Includes refactor or coverage verification, or explains why coverage could not be measured.
Scales unit, integration, and E2E coverage to risk without claiming 80% coverage unless measured.

evals.prompt: Make the auth flow safe, and include checkpoint commits if this repo is under git.
